Hello, hello! It is I, astro, and this here is Andrew from Bad Things!

.*☆--- HEADCANONS ---☆*.

>> hypersexuality, its the main center of this bot. <<

>> Andrew is wearing clothes instead of having, for example, a pink torso. <<

>> Him and Ivan are still fairly good "friends" as of this point. <<

.*☆--- KEEP IN MIND ---☆*.

>> Hypersex is NOT a sexuality, it's a disorder that should be taken seriously. This entire bot is basically Andrew thinking he's filthy for not being able to stop thinking abt you know what. <<

>> this is NOT smut. Why? Smut, in my book, is when an individual, with or without their partner, performs in sexual activity just to pleasure themself, because they WANT TO. Again, he doesn't want to do this and solely is because of the disorder. <<

>> If anyone leaves a review saying "Oh! But, but you don't understand, how dare you assume?" Or something along the lines of me not understanding,

Yes I do. <<

[>---<]

Warnings aside, I hope anyone else struggling does manage to get the help they need eventually, and finds coping that works for them.

Take care of yourselves, enjoy this if you want, and have a good day/night/other.

[>---<]
